circuitry.modelPolicy: Every graph and every agent node uses model: inherit unless a user explicitly overrides it in Pi.

webTools.source: pi-web-access is required; pi-exa-search is optional and preferred for first-pass source discovery when installed.

writes.deletePolicy: cleanup graph may delete only temporary files under .pi-gnosis/tmp unless the user explicitly authorizes deleting generated media.

modalities.conversation: Text, ASCII diagrams, and markdown stay in the Pi conversation.
modalities.video: Manim is the video and lecture engine.
modalities.page: zero-native is the native temporary page engine.
modalities.lab: Geist learning patterns plus zero-native create cooler pages, widgets, and explorable labs.
modalities.durableNotes: Obsidian/note-export stores learner-readable notes; temporary pages and labs do not become memory by default.
